---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="content-section" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;">
    <p class="eyebrow">About</p>
    <h1 style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Anurita Srivastava</h1>
    <p style="color:#4A6A88;font-size:0.95rem;">Policy Strategist · Program Manager · Diplomacy</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bio + Skills -->
<div class="content-section">
  <div class="grid-2" style="gap:2.5rem;align-items:start;">
    
    <div>
      <p style="font-size:1.0rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1rem;">
        I work at the intersection of evidence, strategy, and implementation — translating research into programs, partnerships, and policy decisions that improve how institutions serve people and communities.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1rem;">
        During the last seven years, I have worked on AI and product apps, public health issues, evaluated social safety programs, developed a pipeline of donations and partnerships for animal welfare NGOs, managed teams of specialists across different timezones, co-started a sustainable clothing brand, supported policy research, and ensured that my findings informed evidence-based decision-making.
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;">
        In graduate school, I enhanced this kind of experience with studies of program evaluation, causality analysis, data analytics, and evidence-based policy-making at Georgetown University. It is vital to ensure that policies aren't only effective in theory; they must be implemented and yield desired effects, which requires not only methodological but also implementation skills.
      </p>
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#2C4A66;line-height:1.8;">
      As the late Jane Goodall reminds us, “What you do makes a difference, and you have to decide what kind of difference you want to make.” That idea anchors my passion that sits between research and action: evaluating what works, designing programs that can scale responsibly, and helping public and nonprofit institutions make better decisions.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="section-divider">Skills &amp; tools</div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Analysis &amp; statistical programming</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Stata</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">R / Markdown</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Python / LLM / GenAI</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">ArcGIS / spmap</span>
          <span class="pill pill-blue">Power BI</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Evaluation &amp; causal inference</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-sky">RCT design</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Monte Carlo simulation</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">SurveyCTO</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Mixed methods</span>
          <span class="pill pill-sky">Power analysis</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Communication &amp; policy</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Policy briefs & Memo writing</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">CRM/ Salesforce/ SAP</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Data visualisation</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Factchecking</span>
          <span class="pill pill-teal">Theory of Change</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="skills-group">
        <div class="skills-group-name">Program management</div>
        <div class="pills-row">
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Grantmaking/ Candid/ Fundraising</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Budget oversight</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Stakeholder engagement</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Cross-sector partnerships</span>
          <span class="pill pill-slate">Cost-Benefit Analysis</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Experience Timeline -->

<div style="background:#F7FAFE;border-top:1px solid #D0DFF0;border-bottom:1px solid #D0DFF0;">
  <div class="content-section">
    <div class="section-divider">Experience</div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Graduate Research Assistant</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Under Economist Bradley Hardy · Georgetown University</div>
    <div class="tl-years">Jan 2026 – May 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">Examining US labour and social welfare policies, focusing on how safety net programs affect poverty, household stability, income volatility, and child well-being, using data analysis and policy research.</div>
  </div>
</div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Public Policy & Partnerships Intern</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Leherum Advisory | Washington, DC | Remote</div>
    <div class="tl-years">Sept 2025 - Feb 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">Synthesized complex evaluative datasets into evidence-based memos for foundation leaders, identifying funding asymmetries for international development to maximize social impact. Evaluated global interventions to provide cost-effective frameworks and strategic partnership recommendations.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#6ECDC5;"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Communications & Partnerships Manager</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Pawasana | Animal Welfare Wellness Brand | Remote</div>
    <div class="tl-years">May 2024 - Aug 2024</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">Orchestrated a catalytic fundraising strategy that secured a 25% growth in the donor pipeline and a 20% increase in philanthropic revenue within three months. Executed corporate outreach programs that boosted organizational visibility and engagement by 40%.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#8BBFE8;"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Program Manager - Data</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Junglee Games | Bangalore, India | On-site</div>
    <div class="tl-years">Jan 2024 - May 2024</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">Managed a team of 40; streamlined data architecture, boosting response speeds by 48% to facilitate real-time executive decision-making. Authored technical notes and led stakeholder meetings on Key Performance Indicators (KPI) and team output; managed complex Objectives and Key Results (OKRs) to ensure alignment between technical execution and business goals.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#A3CCF0;"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Project Manager - Strategy</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Walking Tree Technologies | Berlin, Germany | Hybrid</div>
    <div class="tl-years">Jan 2023 - Dec 2023</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">Managed a diverse team of 20 to deliver end-to-end Software-as-a-service (Saas) projects for clients across the globe, overseeing complex system migrations and ensuring operational agility. Automated monitoring systems and data pipelines, reducing manual reporting by 10 hours/week. Leveraged financial modeling and SWOT to deliver actionable insights, accelerating project deliveries and driving a 28% revenue increase.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="tl-dot-col"><div class="tl-dot" style="background:#B8D8F8;"></div></div>
  <div>
    <div class="tl-role">Product Engineer</div>
    <div class="tl-org">Atlassian, Zomato, Wysa | India</div>
    <div class="tl-years">Aug 2019 - Nov 2022</div>
    <div class="tl-desc">
      <ul>
       <li>Competitively selected for Apple's Entrepreneur Camp at Cupertino, CA in 2019. Represented Wysa with the CEO.</li>
        <li>Accepted the pre-placement offer at Wysa, Promoted twice at Zomato.</li>
        <li>Developed and shipped the IP-patented ‘Smart AI Replies’ feature at Atlassian, utilizing on-device machine learning to enhance user engagement and system efficiency.</li>
        <li>Led the end-to-end incubation of Contactless Dining in 2020, from ideation to final software release, at Zomato. Was a volunteer program officer for their Feeding India NGO.</li>
        <li>Increased premium user conversion by adding accessibility features, better conversion pipeline and Augmented Reality to Wysa's AI mental health chatbot app.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Education -->
<div class="content-section">
  <div class="section-divider">Education</div>
  <div class="grid-2">
    <div style="background:#DAEEFF;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#2E7DBF;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Graduate</div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A3A5C;margin-bottom:0.2rem;">Master of Public Policy</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4A6A88;">Georgetown University · McCourt School</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#8AA4C0;">2024 – 2026</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#F7FAFE;border:1px solid #D0DFF0;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8AA4C0;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Undergraduate</div>
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A3A5C;margin-bottom:0.2rem;">B.Tech. Information Technology</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4A6A88;">SRM University of Chennai</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#8AA4C0;">2015 – 2019</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
